question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: List all outpatient within normal range of creatinine phosphokinase. Give me the distinct ids. outpatient refers to Admission = '-'; normal range of creatinine phosphokinase refers to CPK < 250;
orig_masked: List all [C58] [C20] of [C20]. Give me the distinct [C63]. [C58] refers to [C58] = '[V2]'; [C20] of [C20] refers to [C20] < [V1];; [V1] is a value of the column [C20]; [V2] is a value of the column [C58]
orig_evidence: outpatient refers to Admission = '-'; normal range of creatinine phosphokinase refers to CPK < 250;
orig_gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.CPK < 250 AND T1.Admission = '-'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Provide the heights of the heroes whose eye colours are amber.  heights of the heroes refers to height_cm; eye colours are amber refers to colour.colour = 'Amber' WHERE eye_colour_id = colour.id;

orig_evidence: heights of the heroes refers to height_cm; eye colours are amber refers to colour.colour = 'Amber' WHERE eye_colour_id = colour.id;
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.height_cm FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id WHERE T2.colour = 'Amber'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Among all the players whose weight is under 130, how many of them preferred foot in attacking is left? weight < 130; preferred foot in attacking refers to preferred_foot; preferred_foot = 'left';
orig_masked: Among all the [T4] whose [C127] is under [V2], how many of them [C159] is [V1]? [C127] < [V2]; [C159] refers to [C159]; [C159] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C159]; [V2] is a value of the column [C127]
orig_evidence: weight < 130; preferred foot in attacking refers to preferred_foot; preferred_foot = 'left';
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t1.id) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.weight < 130 AND t2.preferred_foot = 'left'

question: <QUESTION>

question: <QUESTION>

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Among the account opened, how many female customers who were born before 1950 and stayed in Sokolov? Customers refer to clients; Female refers to gender = 'F'; Names of districts appear in column A2
orig_masked: Among the [T1], how many [C12] [T3] who were [C9] before [V2] and stayed in [V1]? [T3] refer to [T3]; [C12] refers to [C12] = '[V3]'; [C24] appear in column [C24]; [V1] is a value of the column [C24]; [V2] is a value of the column [C9]; [V3] is a value of the column [C12]
orig_evidence: Customers refer to clients; Female refers to gender = 'F'; Names of districts appear in column A2
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.client_id) FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.gender = 'F' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.birth_date) < '1950' AND T1.A2 = 'Sokolov'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Please provide the full name of the away team that scored the most goals. full name refers to team_long_name; away team refers to away_team_api_id; scored the most goals refers to MAX(away_team_goal)
orig_masked: Please provide the [C173] of the [C39] that [C40]. [C173] refers to [C173]; [C39] refers to [C39]; [C40] refers to MAX([C40])
orig_evidence: full name refers to team_long_name; away team refers to away_team_api_id; scored the most goals refers to MAX(away_team_goal)
orig_gold_sql: SELECT t2.team_long_name FROM Match AS t1 INNER JOIN Team AS t2 ON t1.away_team_api_id = t2.team_api_id ORDER BY t1.away_team_goal DESC LIMIT 1

question: <QUESTION>

orig_evidence: build up play passing refers to buildUpPlayPassing; buildUpPlayPassing > 70; short names refers to team_short_name;

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What is the average height of the superheroes from Marvel Comics?  superheroes from Marvel Comics refers to publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'; average height of the superheroes refers to AVG(height_cm)
orig_masked: What is the average [C23] of the [T9] from [V1]?  [T9] from [V1] refers to [C15] = '[V1]'; average [C23] of the [T9] refers to AVG([C23]); [V1] is a value of the column [C15]
orig_evidence: superheroes from Marvel Comics refers to publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'; average height of the superheroes refers to AVG(height_cm)
orig_gold_sql: SELECT AVG(T1.height_cm) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Give the name of the league had the most matches end as draw in the 2016 season? most matches end as draw refers to MAX(SUM(home_team_goal = away_team_goal)); 2016 season refers to season = '2015/2016';
orig_masked: Give the [C5] of the [T2] had the most [C94],[C40] in the [C108] [C108]? most [C94],[C40] refers to MAX(SUM([C94] = [C40])); [C108] [C108] refers to [C108] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C108]
orig_evidence: most matches end as draw refers to MAX(SUM(home_team_goal = away_team_goal)); 2016 season refers to season = '2015/2016';
orig_gold_sql: SELECT t2.name FROM Match AS t1 INNER JOIN League AS t2 ON t1.league_id = t2.id WHERE t1.season = '2015/2016' AND t1.home_team_goal = t1.away_team_goal GROUP BY t2.name ORDER BY COUNT(t1.id) DESC LIMIT 1
